top_signals.title: Cost of Iran war rises to $37.5 billion, Pentagon requests $67.1 billion more
top_signals.summary: The Iran war has cost the DoD $37.5 billion to date, Hegseth told senators Tuesday, as he requested $67.1 billion more in emergency funding.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: TKMS Drops Out of Race to Acquire GNYK
top_signals.summary: German warship builder TKMS said on Tuesday it is no longer interested in acquiring smaller shipyard German Naval Yards, also known as GNYK.That would make German defence group Rheinmetall the only bidder currently in the running to purchase the ship maker, which has about 350 staff.Handelsblatt fir
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ‘Quad’ top diplomats focus on ASEAN maritime security — but don’t mention China
top_signals.summary: The officials said in a joint statement that "peace and stability in the Indo-Pacific maritime domain underpin the security and prosperity of the region."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US seizes over 1,000 websites in FIFA World Cup piracy crackdown
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Justice Department has seized more than 1,000 websites and blocked 1,970 domains used to stream FIFA World Cup 2026 matches without authorization. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Spain fines 23andMe nearly $3 million for cybersecurity failings enabling 2023 hack
top_signals.summary: The Agencia Española de Protección de Datos (AEPD) announced the fine on Friday, saying in its decision that more than 2,600 Spaniards were impacted by a breach affecting 6.9 million people worldwide.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: Chinese leaders zero in on need for stimulus for economy  Financial Times
